issue_title: Fix broken runner in Office Online.
issue_body_preview:
https://github.com/OfficeDev/script-lab/issues/607

Root cause: runner was calling "window.top", which on Office Online is in a different domain -- and hence was throwing an exception.

Fixed by surrounding logic with try/catch (and refactoring into separate function for cleanliness).  Also did
test_description_zh: 在 Office Online 环境中打开 Script Lab，编写或选择一个代码片段，然后点击运行（Run）按钮，观察 Runner 面板是否能正常加载并执行代码片段。
expected_result_zh: Runner 面板在 Office Online 环境中能正常加载，代码片段成功执行并显示输出结果，不出现异常报错或空白页面。
